---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the decoder
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to do?

A short description of the use case.

## Why isn't it possible today?

What blocks you with the current code?

## Sketch of the desired API / output

Pseudo-code or example output, if any.

## Compatibility

- Does this change the public Python API? (yes / no)
- Does this change the C++ ABI? (yes / no)
- Does this break the byte-identical round-trip? (yes / no — and if yes,
  please justify)

## Related areas of the codebase

(Optional) which modules would need touching.
